details.productUrlName: Saruman the White Hand Showcase Scrolls

customAttributes.description:
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, amass Orcs X, where X is that spell's mana value. (Put X+1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also an Orc. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Orc Army creature token first.)
Goblins and Orcs you control have ward 2.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: <em>Over all his works a dark smoke hung and wrapped itself about the sides of Orthanc.
